slide1.title: Welcome to LexiNote
slide1.description: A highly personalized flashcard platform with a super cute interface. Collect, manage, and memorize anything you want effortlessly.

slide2.title: Build Your Library
slide2.description: Quickly add flashcards with images manually, or bulk import thousands of words from Excel & JSON files in just one click.

slide3.title: Smart Spaced Repetition
slide3.description: Spaced Repetition technology automatically predicts your memory curve, reminding you to review words exactly when you are about to forget them.

slide4.title: Learn & Play
slide4.description: Blow away boredom with our card-flipping Match Game system. Engrave vocabulary into your subconscious and collect achievements!
